tasks.subject: Task 0: Leaflet 의존성 추가
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `leaflet@^1.9` + `@types/leaflet` 추가, 빌드/타입체크 무사 통과.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/package.json`
- Modify: `app/package-lock.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- leaflet in dependencies, @types/leaflet in devDependencies
- npm install succeeds
- npm run check baseline-equivalent

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/package.json", "app/package-lock.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["leaflet in dependencies", "@types/leaflet in devDependencies", "npm install succeeds", "npm run check baseline-equivalent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: parseGeoUrl 파서 + 테스트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** geo:lat,lon[;...] 문자열 파서.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/lib/editor/geoMap/parseGeoUrl.ts`
- Test: `app/tests/unit/editor/parseGeoUrl.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/parseGeoUrl.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/geoMap/parseGeoUrl.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/parseGeoUrl.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/parseGeoUrl.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["valid coords parsed", "negative/integer/optional-params handled", "out-of-range returns null", "malformed returns null", "all tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: renderGeoMap — Leaflet 동적 로더 + mount/destroy
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Leaflet 지연 로더 + OSM 타일 mount/destroy.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/lib/editor/geoMap/renderGeoMap.ts`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run build && find build -name 'marker-*.png' | head`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/geoMap/renderGeoMap.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run build && find build -name 'marker-*.png' | head", "acceptanceCriteria": ["singleton promise", "CSS injected once", "marker icon path workaround", "mountGeoMap with destroy", "build succeeds with marker PNGs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: geoMapPlugin — 스캔 + 데코 + atomic 키
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ProseMirror plugin — geo URL 스캔 + widget 데코 + atomic 키.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/lib/editor/geoMap/geoMapPlugin.ts`
- Test: `app/tests/unit/editor/geoMapPlugin.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/geoMapPlugin.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/geoMap/geoMapPlugin.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/geoMapPlugin.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/geoMapPlugin.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["findGeoUrlRanges scans all text nodes", "mark-agnostic detection", "invalid coords filtered", "widget deco with stable key", "atomic Backspace/Delete/Arrow keys", "all tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: insertCurrentLocation 헬퍼 + 테스트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** navigator.geolocation → tomboyUrlLink mark 텍스트 삽입.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/lib/editor/geoMap/insertCurrentLocation.ts`
- Test: `app/tests/unit/editor/insertCurrentLocation.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/insertCurrentLocation.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/geoMap/insertCurrentLocation.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/insertCurrentLocation.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/insertCurrentLocation.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["6-decimal precision", "tomboyUrlLink mark applied", "PERMISSION_DENIED toast", "POSITION_UNAVAILABLE toast", "TIMEOUT toast", "enableHighAccuracy + 10s timeout opts", "all tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: TomboyEditor에 플러그인 등록 + CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** geoMapPlugin extensions 등록 + .tomboy-geo-map CSS (aspect-ratio 1/1).

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check && npm run build && npx vitest run`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check && npm run build && npx vitest run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["createGeoMapPlugin imported", "Extension registered after imagePreview", "aspect-ratio 1/1 + 100% width CSS", "placeholder styling", ".leaflet-container fills box", "no regressions in check/build/tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Toolbar 📍 버튼
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Toolbar 드로어에 📍 현재 위치 삽입 버튼 추가.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/lib/editor/Toolbar.svelte`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check` + 데스크탑 수동 스모크

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/Toolbar.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["insertCurrentLocation imported", "handleGeoClick handler", "📍 button in drawer next to image upload", "npm run check passes", "desktop smoke: button → permission → insert + map renders"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: 수동 통합 검증
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 단위 테스트로 잡지 못하는 통합 동작(Leaflet 실제 렌더, 모바일, sync) 수동 확인.

**Files:** None (수동)

**Verify:** 체크리스트 통과 보고

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "manual: see Task 7 checklist", "acceptanceCriteria": ["desktop insert+render+interact", "invalid coords ignored", "multi-map", "atomic backspace", "permission denied toast", "mobile pan + page scroll", "round-trip via reload"]}
```
